description: Style Note Updated summer style for your feet with catwalk's latest line. Inspired by the fresh fashion fetishes this season, this pair of sandals exemplify versatility - they look good with everything from smart formal day wear to breezy spring separates. Style them with an all-pastel coloured ensembles or a colour pop one, they go well with both! Heel: 1" Product Description Yellow synthetic upper in ballet flat style with an elasticated midfoot strap and decorative stitch detailing Padded inner with a heel patch TPU outsole with an upraised heel and floral lugs all over Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
